attacks.name: Sky Return
attacks.effect: Return this Pokémon and all cards attached to it to your hand.

effect: Search your deck for a card that evolves from 1 of your Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-EX) and put it onto that Pokémon. (This counts as evolving that Pokémon.) Shuffle your deck afterward. You can use this card during your first turn or on a Pokémon that was put into play this turn.
name: Wally

effect: Search your deck for up to 3 Colorless Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.
name: Winona

effect: Move a basic Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.
name: Energy Switch

effect: Put a Supporter card from your discard pile into your hand.
name: VS Seeker
